creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
- Update to 20121026
- Take maintainership

Makefile changed:
+DIST_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
+COMMENT=	Action flight simulation computer program, use OSG
+DESKTOP_ENTRIES=
+	${LN} -sf ${PREFIX}/share/doc/palomino/images/palominoLogo.png ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/${PORTNAME}.png

Changed and refined:
 pkg-descr
 pkg-plist

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test, sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: update, diff: ports)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
looks fine.

port test: clean

Can't give build log, because RedPorts not works at the time.
